ab: Yaku ni tama mu o musa nami qmita nirih tama mu ka shiga.
ch: 昨天我和爸爸去拜訪我的叔叔。
en: Yesterday, my father and I visited my uncle.

ab: Mluqih ka qaqay nirih tama da.
Rngagan nami na, empruq kingal bling ka dnamux sapah.
ch: 他告訴我們，房子的屋頂破了一個洞。
en: He told us that there was a hole in the roof of his house.

ab: Pklug smmalu dnamux ka hiya siida ga, mtucing pnaah dnamux da.
ch: 他在修理屋頂時，從屋頂摔下來了。
en: He fell off the roof while repairing it.

ab: Madas hiyi kacing ni sbiki ka tama sbgay na nirih tama.
ch: 爸爸帶了牛肉和檳榔給叔叔。
en: My father brought beef and betel nuts for my uncle.

ab: Empprngaw nami ruwan sapah ka yaku ni nirih tama, seasug kuna rmngaw lala bi endaan na.
ch: 我和叔叔在房間裡聊天，他分享了很多故事。
en: My uncle and I chatted in the room, and he shared many stories.

ab: Mmowsa ku siida, tmdahu knan ka nirih tama, wada ku maaparu ni mtradaw bi uri da.
ch: 我要離開前，叔叔誇我長高了，也變得更帥氣了。
en: Before I left, my uncle praised me for growing taller and becoming more handsome.

ab: Rngagan mu, “Tgai saw malu ka qaqay su da o iyah tuhuy sapah nami uri.”
ch: 我說：「等叔叔腳好了，下次也來我們家玩。」
en: I said, “When your foot gets better, come to our house next time and visit us.”
